title: malache fruticosa
intro: Malache fruticosa, also known as Pleurisy root, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The root of the plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Malache fruticosa is believed to have health benefits including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant is typically prepared into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and can also be used as a poultice to apply topical relief.
